name: IdsEdwMadorGrpExt

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ftv2_TMP_IdsEdwMadorGrpExt;WITH cte_GroupData AS (SELECT GRP_MA_DOR_SK, GRP_ID, TAX_YR, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, AS_OF_DTM, GRP_SK, GRP_NM, GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, GRP_ADDR_LN_1, GRP_ADDR_LN_2, GRP_ADDR_LN_3, GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.GRP_MA_DOR WHERE (SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.FctsRunCycle} OR SRC_SYS_CD = 'BCBSSC' AND LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.BcbsScRunCycle} OR SRC_SYS_CD = 'UWS' AND LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.UwsRunCycle}), cte_Cd_Mppng AS (SELECT CD_MPPNG_SK, SRC_DRVD_LKUP_VAL, TRGT_CD, TRGT_CD_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SRC_CLCTN_CD = 'IDS' AND SRC_DOMAIN_NM = 'STATE' AND TRGT_CLCTN_CD = 'IDS' AND TRGT_DOMAIN_NM = 'STATE'), cte_Lkp_Grp AS (SELECT cte_GroupData.*, cte_Cd_Mppng.TRGT_CD, cte_Cd_Mppng.TRGT_CD_NM FROM cte_GroupData LEFT JOIN cte_Cd_Mppng ON cte_GroupData.GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK = cte_Cd_Mppng.SRC_DRVD_LKUP_VAL), cte_Trf_Group AS (SELECT cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_MA_DOR_SK AS GRP_MA_DOR_SK, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_ID AS GRP_ID, cte_Lkp_Grp.TAX_YR AS TAX_YR, cte_Lkp_Grp.SRC_SYS_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EdwRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EdwRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte_Lkp_Grp.AS_OF_DTM AS AS_OF_DTM, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_SK AS GRP_SK, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_NM AS GRP_NM, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_ADDR_LN_1, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_ADDR_LN_2, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_ADDR_LN_3, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, cte_Lkp_Grp.GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, cte_Lkp_Grp.TRGT_CD AS GRP_ADDR_ST_CD, cte_Lkp_Grp.TRGT_CD_NM AS GRP_ADDR_ST_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EdwRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EdwRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CASE WHEN cte_Lkp_Grp.SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' THEN @{pipeline().parameters.FctsRunCycle} WHEN cte_Lkp_Grp.SRC_SYS_CD = 'BCBSSC' THEN @{pipeline().parameters.BcbsScRunCycle} WHEN cte_Lkp_Grp.SRC_SYS_CD = 'UWS' THEN @{pipeline().parameters.UwsRunCycle} ELSE 1 END AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte_Lkp_Grp) SELECT GRP_MA_DOR_SK, GRP_ID, TAX_YR, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, AS_OF_DTM, GRP_SK, GRP_NM, GRP_CNTCT_FIRST_NM, GRP_CNTCT_MIDINIT, GRP_CNTCT_LAST_NM, GRP_ADDR_LN_1, GRP_ADDR_LN_2, GRP_ADDR_LN_3, GRP_ADDR_CITY_NM, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, GRP_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, GRP_ADDR_ST_CD_SK, GRP_ADDR_ST_CD, GRP_ADDR_ST_NM, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.ftv2_TMP_IdsEdwMadorGrpExt FROM cte_Trf_Group
